## Lifecycle machines

### adr_lifecycle

- States: `proposed` · `accepted` · `rejected` · `withdrawn` · `deprecated` · `superseded`
- Terminals: `rejected` · `withdrawn` · `deprecated` · `superseded`
- Edges: `proposed -> accepted`, `proposed -> rejected`, `proposed -> withdrawn`, `accepted -> deprecated`, `accepted -> superseded`

### batch_lifecycle

- States: `planned` · `open` · `closed` · `canceled` · `abandoned`
- Terminals: `closed` · `canceled` · `abandoned`
- Edges: `planned -> open`, `open -> closed`, `planned -> canceled`, `open -> abandoned`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `abandoned`: `conservation-unresolved` · `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled`
  - `canceled`: `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled`

### deviation_lifecycle

- States: `active` · `expired` · `revoked`
- Terminals: `expired` · `revoked`
- Edges: `active -> expired`, `active -> revoked`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `revoked`: `assumptions-changed` · `superseded` · `project-canceled`

### directive_lifecycle

- States: `draft` · `queued` · `received` · `acknowledged` · `applied` · `rejected` · `superseded` · `voided`
- Terminals: `applied` · `rejected` · `superseded` · `voided`
- Edges: `draft -> queued`, `queued -> received`, `received -> acknowledged`, `acknowledged -> applied`, `acknowledged -> rejected`, `queued -> superseded`, `received -> superseded`, `acknowledged -> superseded`, `draft -> voided`, `queued -> voided`, `received -> voided`, `acknowledged -> voided`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `voided`: `run-terminal` · `evaluated-obsolete`

### escalation_lifecycle

- States: `open` · `resolved` · `withdrawn` · `lapsed`
- Terminals: `resolved` · `withdrawn` · `lapsed`
- Edges: `open -> resolved`, `open -> withdrawn`, `open -> lapsed`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `withdrawn`: `raiser-withdrawn` · `obsolete` · `project-canceled`

### policy_lifecycle

- States: `active` · `orphaned` · `superseded` · `revoked`
- Terminals: `orphaned` · `superseded` · `revoked`
- Edges: `active -> orphaned`, `active -> superseded`, `active -> revoked`

### project_lifecycle

- States: `active` · `paused` · `completion-claimed` · `completion-verified` · `closed` · `canceled`
- Terminals: `closed` · `canceled`
- Edges: `active -> paused`, `paused -> active`, `active -> completion-claimed`, `completion-claimed -> completion-verified`, `completion-claimed -> active`, `completion-verified -> closed`, `active -> canceled`, `paused -> canceled`, `completion-claimed -> canceled`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `canceled`: `stopped-by-owner` · `superseded` · `lapsed` · `limit-reached`
  - `closed`: `accepted` · `acceptance-declined` · `acceptance-lapsed`
  - `completion-verified`: `awaiting-acceptance` · `closure-in-progress`
  - `paused`: `blocked` · `awaiting-decision` · `owner-hold`

### run_lifecycle

- States: `proposed` · `declined` · `approved` · `active` · `paused` · `completion-claimed` · `completion-verified` · `failed` · `canceled` · `abandoned` · `authorization-exhausted`
- Terminals: `completion-verified` · `failed` · `canceled` · `abandoned` · `authorization-exhausted`
- Edges: `proposed -> approved`, `proposed -> declined`, `declined -> proposed`, `proposed -> canceled`, `declined -> canceled`, `approved -> canceled`, `approved -> active`, `active -> paused`, `paused -> active`, `active -> completion-claimed`, `paused -> completion-claimed`, `completion-claimed -> completion-verified`, `active -> failed`, `active -> canceled`, `active -> abandoned`, `active -> authorization-exhausted`, `paused -> failed`, `paused -> canceled`, `paused -> abandoned`, `paused -> authorization-exhausted`
- Reason sets (present iff the state requires one):
  - `abandoned`: `decision-lapsed`
  - `authorization-exhausted`: `limit-reached`
  - `canceled`: `stopped-by-user` · `stopped-by-policy` · `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled` · `proposal-withdrawn` · `proposal-declined`
  - `failed`: `failed-verification` · `failed-deployment`
  - `paused`: `blocked` · `awaiting-decision`
- Reason sets closed per source state:
  - from `approved`: `stopped-by-user` · `stopped-by-policy` · `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled`
  - from `declined`: `proposal-declined` · `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled`
  - from `proposed`: `proposal-withdrawn` · `superseded-by-replanning` · `project-canceled`
- Missing codes (flagged, unratified — routed to a planning cycle):
  - `completion-verified`: no ratified code for the successful terminal; the consumer uses `completed` (unratified) — VC-class closure routed to a planning cycle

## Record requirements

`durability` · `revision-history` · `provenance` · `traceability` · `attribution` · `accessibility` · `portability` · `retention` · `auditability` · `immutability-or-correction-history` (CS-079).

## Stage pipeline

| # | Stage | Pattern | Feeds into |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `initiation` | foundational | `requirements` |
| 2 | `requirements` | foundational | `system-design` |
| 3 | `system-design` | foundational | `increment-design` |
| 4 | `increment-design` | iterative | `implementation` |
| 5 | `implementation` | iterative | `verification` |
| 6 | `verification` | iterative | `deployment`, `implementation` |
| 7 | `deployment` | iterative | `closure`, `increment-design` |
| 8 | `closure` | terminal | `initiation` |
